channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 700mm x 300mm x 43mm Temporary Closure 15min db TM Outside number 19 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 500mm x 400mm x 44mm 2 x NSD Temporary Closure 15min db Outside number 17 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 28th May
item.description:
Hedge letter 1 hand delivered to 71 Newton Road low hanging tree branches.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 28th May
item.description:
To taramc over where bollard has been hit adn removed has barriers around, please remove barreriers from site also.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking visibility on road/junction (Grass/verge) problem, 28th May
item.description:
Customer has called to report car parked on grass - this will attract more vehicles and damage grass, kerbs, footway and aesthetics of the area. The vehicle owner does not live in the close vicinity.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking public footpath, dog walker injured, 28th May
item.description:
Footpath alongside burial ground blocked by fallen tree. Dog walker injured climbing over it. W3w gravy.taxi.feels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 900mm x 900mm x 42mm Temporary Closure 15min db TM Outside number 52 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with 2 way stop and go CW abrupt level (tree roots) 1100x900x41mm perm repair (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 300mm x 300mm x 57mm 2 x NSD Give and take TM Outside number 27 (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 900 x 400mm x 55mm Give and take TM Outside number 27 (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: Tree on pavement in Albany Road has died, 28th May
item.description:
The tree is outside no 28 Albany Rd Cheltenham. It has been like that for at least a year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Albany Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th May
item.description:
Cut back vegetation to boundary NWD for visibility Approx 11mts long Standard TM required with fway closure (Embankment & Cuttings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation, 28th May
item.description:
Good morning, It was reported to me this morning by a resident that this footpath is very overgrown with trees/vegetation and needs a good cut back. It would be great if you could add this to your maintenance schedule. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on bridge, 28th May
item.description:
Pothole on bridge on 'Downhill' side of carriageway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Two Hedges Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary Approx 5 mts long (possible birds nesting) Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary Approx 43mts long Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary Approx 17mts long x2.5 mts high Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with Lane 1 closure with fway closure lift and reset sunken cover on FW STATS (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with lane 1 closure with fway closure FW pothole 400x250x30mm perm repair STATS (FW6 Pothole)
